title: il_calculator
description: Impermanent loss calculator for standard constant-product AMM and Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity positions.

entry_price.description: Token price at time of entry (USD)

position_size_usd.description: Position size in USD at entry

price_lower.description: Lower price bound (required for concentrated positions)

price_upper.description: Upper price bound (required for concentrated positions, must be > price_lower)

lp_value_usd.description: Current value of LP position in USD

hodl_value_usd.description: Value if tokens were simply held (no LP)

in_range.description: Whether current price is within the concentrated range (concentrated only)

amplification_factor.description: Capital efficiency multiplier vs full-range (concentrated only)

net_yield.description: Net yield after IL (if yield data available)
